notes: Runtime ABI wave in closure phase. Runtime-ABI stub retired: runtime/include/fuse_rt.h expanded to 31 functions covering process control, memory, IO, process, time, threads, sync, and channels. Runtime implementation files: runtime/src/{abort,memory,io,process,time,thread,sync,chan}.c with cross-platform primitives (Win32 on Windows, pthreads on POSIX). Build: runtime/Makefile compiles libfuse_rt.a and runs five C smoke tests (memory, io, process, thread, sync). Compiler bridge: compiler/mir/w16_ops.go + w16_builder.go + w16_validate.go add 7 new MIR ops (OpSpawn, OpThreadJoin, OpChanNew, OpChanSend, OpChanRecv, OpChanClose, OpPanic). compiler/codegen/c11.go emits each op as the corresponding fuse_rt_* call, pulls in fuse_rt.h when needed, and renders TermUnreachable as `fuse_rt_abort("unreachable")`. compiler/cc/compiler.go gains Options + CompileWith for include-dir / extra-object / extra-lib passthrough. compiler/driver/runtime.go:locateRuntimeArtifacts finds runtime/, builds libfuse_rt.a on demand, and returns link args. tools/checkruntime validates header syntax and header↔source coverage. Proof: TestSpawnObservable and TestChannelRoundTrip build MIR, emit C, link libfuse_rt.a, run native binaries, and assert exit 42. TestSpawnEmission / TestJoinEmission / TestChannelOpsEmission / TestPanicEmission cover codegen unit shapes. STUBS.md W16 history block appended; WC016 logged using Rule 10.2 mandated 6-field template. Tenth full wave under Rule 9.5 three-commit discipline: P00 audit (abbebed), implementation (01c5b77), PCL (this commit). Next: enter W17 Codegen C11 hardening — the wave that wires W15 tagged MIR ops and W16 spawn/chan MIR ops through the compiler's default lowering path and emits policy-appropriate C11 (cast narrowing, fn-ptr thunks for spawn, incremental driver integration).
